file_insights.changes: Status updated from 'pending' to 'completed' with notes explaining conditional execution
file_insights.significance: Workflow control: conditional subtask marked complete because upstream dependency failed for non-prompt reasons
file_insights.pattern: JSON metadata mutation - status and notes fields updated to reflect conditional analysis outcome

patterns_discovered.name: Conditional subtask execution
patterns_discovered.description: Subtask-1-3 was designed to execute only if subtask-1-2 failed; when blocked by environmental issue (disk space), the conditional logic correctly identified this as non-prompt-related
patterns_discovered.significance: Allows workflows to optimize execution by skipping unnecessary analysis when root cause is known

patterns_discovered.name: Upstream failure mode differentiation
patterns_discovered.description: Analysis distinguished between environmental failures (disk space) and prompt-template failures; previous verification (subtask-1-1) confirmed prompt was already explicit
patterns_discovered.significance: Prevents wasted effort analyzing prompts when failures are infrastructure-related

patterns_discovered.name: Prompt robustness verification chain
patterns_discovered.description: Subtask-1-1 verified prompt template lines 308-311 were explicit; subtask-1-3 confirmed no changes needed despite downstream test failure
patterns_discovered.significance: Multi-phase validation builds confidence in prompt quality

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Environmental constraints masked by test failures
gotchas_discovered.context: Disk space issue in subtask-1-2 could have been mistaken for prompt inadequacy if analysis wasn't rigorous
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Root cause analysis required; subprocess failures need stderr/exit-code examination, not just top-level failure status

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Conditional subtasks require explicit completion notes
gotchas_discovered.context: Status changed to 'completed' even though no analysis occurred, because the condition (upstream failure) was met but didn't require action
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Document in notes why conditional wasn't executed; prevents confusion about whether task was skipped or completed

approach_outcome.rationale: Conditional subtask correctly identified that the upstream failure (subtask-1-2) was environmental (disk space), not prompt-related, and that the prompt template was already sufficiently explicit per prior verification
approach_outcome.decision_made: No prompt changes required; documented in notes and marked complete

recommendations.suggestion: Before running integration tests, verify environmental constraints (disk space, memory, network) to avoid masking real issues
Use notes field consistently to explain why conditional branches didn't execute; critical for understanding workflow outcomes
When conditional tasks report 'not needed', always document the reasoning (e.g., 'upstream failure environmental, not code-related')
